subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of the Lord of Names unto him who hath clung to the Most Glorious Handle and turned unto God, the Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن مالک الاسماء الی الذی تمسک بعروه الابهی و اقبل الی الله فاطر
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
